seo.title: Customer Results
seo.description: See real results from HTCOACHING members...

header.subtitle: Stories of physical, mental, and habit changes from HTCOACHING members.

principles.philosophy_title: Your result is what we pursue
principles.philosophy_text: HT Coaching does not sell a beautiful "after" photo. We build a clear process: understand the problem, set goals, train with correct form, eat properly, and track progress continuously.
principles.text1: Each profile starts from the member's current condition, daily schedule, and unique problems.
principles.text2: The training plan is adjusted weekly based on progress, form, and recovery capacity.
principles.text3: Before-after photos, measurements, and stories are recorded so you can see your journey clearly.

stories_list.no_results: No transformation stories found matching your filters.
